attributes.magic: PE32 executable (console) Intel 80386 Mono/.Net assembly, for MS Windows

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO Base64 Encoded powershell.exe in HTTP Response M1
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET INFO Base64 Encoded powershell.exe in HTTP Response M1"; flow:established,from_server; http.content_type; content:"text/plain"; startswith; file.data; content:"cG93ZXJzaGVsbC5leG"; fast_pattern; reference:url,otx.alienvault.com/pulse/5a1348416dd9eb0c92d9897a; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2025238; rev:4; metadata:created_at 2018_01_22, former_category INFO, updated_at 2020_08_24;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET HUNTING Terse Request for .txt - Likely Hostile
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET HUNTING Terse Request for .txt - Likely Hostile"; flow:established,to_server; http.method; content:"GET"; http.uri; content:".txt"; endswith; bsize:6; fast_pattern; http.header_names; content:!"Referer"; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2034581; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2021_12_03, deployment Perimeter, former_category HUNTING, signature_severity Informational, updated_at 2021_12_03;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp any any -> any $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"POLICY-OTHER HTTP request by IPv4 address attempt"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"Host:",fast_pattern,nocase; pcre:"/^Host\x3a\s*(?:(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\.){3}(?:25[0-5]|2[0-4][0-9]|[01]?[0-9]?[0-9])\s*:?\s*\d*\s*$/smi"; service:http; reference:url,www.w3.org/Protocols/rfc2616/rfc2616-sec15.html; classtype:policy-violation; sid:50447; rev:1; )
